assignments.name: companyName
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const url = $json.company || $json.url || $json.URL || ''; const match = url.match(/https?:\/\/(?:www\.)?([^\/\.]+)/i); return match ? match[1].charAt(0).toUpperCase() + match[1].slice(1) : 'Unknown'; })() }}

parameters.description: Get information about a YouTube channel including recent videos, subscriber count, and channel description. Input should be the channel name or URL.
Search YouTube for videos by keyword. Returns video titles, URLs, view counts and publish dates. Input should be a search query.
Get information about a VKontakte (VK) group or page including members count and description. Input should be VK URL or group ID (e.g., vk.com/mangotelecom or mangotelecom).
Get information about a Telegram channel including subscribers count and recent posts. Input should be Telegram URL or username (e.g., t.me/mango_office or mango_office).
Fetch and parse any website to extract title, description, headings, phones, and emails. Input should be a full URL.
Search for a company/product on G2.com to get ratings and reviews. Input should be the company or product name.

options.systemMessage:
Ти аналітик конкурентів VoIP/контакт-центрів. Аналізуй INPUT дані і поверни JSON.

КРИТИЧНО:
- НЕ використовуй tools - всі дані вже в INPUT
- Поверни ТІЛЬКИ JSON без ```markdown```
- Максимум 3 речення на кожне поле

ФОРМАТ ВІДПОВІДІ:
{
  "company": "назва",
  "url": "url",
  "youtubeActivity": "опис або -",
  "linkedinActivity": "-",
  "facebookActivity": "-",
  "aggregatorMentions": "G2 інфо або -",
  "socialMentionsCount": число,
  "newFeatures": ["фіча1", "фіча2", "фіча3"],
  "problems": ["проблема1 або -"],
  "reviewInsights": "1 речення",
  "news": ["новина або -"],
  "blogArticles": [{"title":"","date":"","summary":""}],
  "customerPains": ["біль1", "біль2", "біль3"],
  "customerWants": ["потреба1", "потреба2", "потреба3"],
  "summary": "2-3 речення"
}
